name: Garlic Dill Pickles
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp red pepper flakes per pint
recipeInstructions:
1. Place dill, garlic, and red pepper flakes into jars.
2. Pack cucumbers into jars until snugly filled.
3. Pour boiling vinegar mixture over the top of the jars.
4. Process in a boiling water bath for 10 minutes.
5. Allow to sit for 2 weeks before opening and judging.
Note: These pickles were judged at the Quesnel 1996 Fall Fair and had a third place win.
